ddls:
CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "name" TEXT /* Trade name of the medication */,
  "generic_name" TEXT /* Generic name of the medication */,
  "html_link" TEXT /* HTML link to the drug's detailed webpage */,
  "classes" TEXT /* Classification of the drug (e.g., atypical antipsychotics) */,
  "off_label" TEXT /* Indicates if the medication is used off-label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication entry was last updated */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the medication being reviewed */,
  "review_link" TEXT /* HTML link to the reviews page for the medication */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews submitted for the medication */,
  "score" REAL /* Average score given to the medication by users */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity rating of the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review entry was last updated */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Actual review text submitted by users */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., reviewer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medication_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the medication class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication class entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication class entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the review being submitted */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user review entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user review entry was last updated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action logged */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the admin user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., review moderation) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Brief details about the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin action entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the admin action entry was last updated */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the admin action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_actions_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback submitted by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback entry was last updated */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, issue, praise) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
